data.title: Web UI backend support: GET /runs list endpoint + serve SPA static build from FastAPI

data.body: Enabler for the web UI (NAVI-17). Two additive API changes: (1) GET /runs -- list recent runs (id, created_at, route, status, cost_usd, tokens; newest first, simple limit param) so the UI can populate history/inspector; today only GET /runs/{id} exists. (2) Serve the SPA's static build from FastAPI (mount a web/dist directory at / with /ask, /runs, /health staying under their existing paths -- decide exact mounting in planning; API routes must win over static). No CORS needed since same-origin. Keeps 127.0.0.1-only posture. No auth changes. No schema changes.

Reviewed cold against plan task_01KTX4514R0YQCAJ3PW2G52VJX (commit f801ae3). Gates: ruff 'All checks passed!'; mypy 'Success: no issues found in 36 source files'; pytest green (all pass, 1 pre-existing NAVI_LIVE_TESTS skip, 0 failures).

Acceptance criteria all met:
- GET /runs: newest-first via order_by(started_at desc, id); limit Query(50, ge=1, le=200) -> 422 outside range (tested); RunSummary uses started_at/ended_at (no invented created_at), matches real Run model; tokens LEFT-JOIN-summed with GROUP BY Run.id, NULL->None (not 0). One query, no N+1.
- /runs defined above /runs/{run_id}; both coexist and tested (test_run_detail_endpoint_unchanged).
- mount_spa: is_dir() guard -> no-op False when web/dist absent (real import-time call returns False since dir missing); mounted AFTER all routes so API wins (precedence tested via /health); StaticFiles from starlette, no new deps.
- Additive only: no existing route/contract changed; existing tests unmodified.

Adversarial spot-checks clear: (1) GROUP BY Run.id + LEFT JOIN does not double-count run header cols nor mis-sum NULL tokens (test proves 30/12 and None). (2) (started_at desc, id) tie-break deterministic. (3) Static test removes 'spa' route in finally and asserts empty; no cross-test leak. (4) Import-time mount_spa(app) reads real web/dist (absent) -> no stale mount; temp-dir tests pass dist_dir explicitly and clean up.

VERDICT: PASS
